title: OpenPayd Secures MiCA License for Crypto Services Across Europe
summary: OpenPayd, a financial infrastructure provider, has obtained a MiCA license, allowing it to offer regulated crypto services in Europe. This move comes as stablecoin adoption continues to grow in the region, with OpenPayd supporting companies like Kraken.
body:
OpenPayd, a company that provides financial infrastructure to firms including the Kraken crypto exchange, has secured a license under the European Union's Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) regulation. This license enables OpenPayd to offer regulated crypto services across Europe, a significant step in the region's growing crypto ecosystem.

The MiCA license is a major milestone for OpenPayd, as it allows the company to provide compliant crypto services to its clients. Stablecoin adoption in Europe has been on the rise, and OpenPayd's new license positions it to support this trend. The company's infrastructure is already used by several major crypto firms, including Kraken, which will benefit from the regulated services.

For everyday users, this development means increased access to regulated crypto services in Europe. As stablecoins become more popular for transactions and trading, having a licensed provider like OpenPayd ensures greater security and compliance. This could lead to more widespread adoption of stablecoins for everyday financial activities.

OpenPayd's MiCA license is part of a broader trend of regulatory clarity in Europe. As more companies obtain these licenses, the crypto market in the region is expected to become more stable and trustworthy. Users should watch for more licensed providers entering the market, which could further enhance the security and accessibility of crypto services in Europe.
twitterThread: OpenPayd just got a MiCA license, meaning regulated crypto services are coming to Europe. Stablecoin adoption is booming, and this is a big step. 🚀
MiCA licenses are the gold standard for crypto regulation in the EU. OpenPayd can now offer compliant services, which is huge for stablecoin growth. Kraken and others will benefit.

What does this mean for you? More secure and regulated crypto services in Europe. Watch for more licensed providers as the market grows. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-06-24-openpayd-secures-mica-license-for-crypto-services-across-europe
